captain.name: Salah
captain.reason: Double gameweek. Two chances to return. Liverpool face Brentford and Fulham. 12-18 pts expected with the armband.

transferIn.name: Palmer
transferIn.reason: Chelsea vs Leicester clean fixture. Palmer has direct contributions in 6 of last 7 GWs.

transferOut.name: Haaland
transferOut.reason: Man City face Arsenal away. Haaland blanked 4 of last 5. Sell now.

differential.name: Isak
differential.reason: Newcastle home vs Everton. 5 goals in last 6 GWs. Only 6.4% owned.

transfers.name: Salah
transfers.reason: Double GW - two games to score/assist. Must-own this week.

transfers.name: Palmer
transfers.reason: Best value mid in the game. Easy fixture and red-hot form.

transfers.name: Haaland
transfers.reason: Arsenal away, out of form. Reinvest the budget into DGW assets.

transfers.reason: Inconsistent returns. Upgrade to Isak or Mbeumo for better value.
